name: LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry
description_short: Miami, FL - LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry at 1823 NW 79th St is your local pawn shop for quick cash and jewelry services.
description_long:
Located at 1823 NW 79th St in Miami, LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry is a standalone pawn shop serving the Allapattah community. This Miami storefront handles cash loans, jewelry appraisals, and buying or selling used goods and collectibles. Specific hours aren't published online, so calling ahead is recommended for visitors to this Miami location in FL.

When you visit LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry in Miami, you can bring jewelry, electronics, tools, or other valuables for appraisal and immediate cash offers. For current availability, loan terms, and item valuations, call the store directly at +1 305-691-3701. The team at this Miami pawn shop can answer questions about what items they currently buy and their typical loan amounts.

If you need fast cash in Miami, a pawn loan from LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry is typically processed same-day with no credit check required. Bring a government-issued ID and the item(s) you want to pawn or sell to close the deal. This neighborhood pawn shop has served Miami residents for quick financing solutions without the lengthy application processes of traditional lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free layaway program with only 10% down payment and no holding fees, explicitly positioned as better than competitors
Mobile app enables customers to check loan status and make payments remotely for convenience
Loyalty rewards program provides points on every payment and purchase redeemable for discounts and special events
Comprehensive protection plan program available for purchased items, particularly jewelry and electronics
Accepts wide range of collateral items (jewelry, firearms, tools, electronics, instruments, bikes) providing flexibility
Multiple locations across Florida and Arkansas reducing geographic barriers for some customers
Established since 2009 with stated focus on clean, organized stores and trained broker teams
cons: Interest rates, fees, and loan terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website, preventing transparent cost comparison
Risk of losing collateral if unable to repay loan within specified timeframe—inherent to pawn model
Limited to Florida, Arkansas, and Puerto Rico; no national presence despite stated mission to reach 1000 stores
No information about APR, repayment periods, or how loan amounts are calculated relative to item value
Loyalty program and protection plans represent additional revenue streams that may incentivize upselling
best_for: Individuals needing same-day cash without credit checks or bank account requirements
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, firearms, musical instruments) seeking immediate liquidity
Customers in Florida or Arkansas seeking to purchase quality used merchandise at discounted prices
Those preferring layaway purchases without upfront fees or membership requirements
diagnosis: La Familia Pawn & Jewelry serves consumers in Florida and Arkansas who need immediate cash against personal collateral or seek discounted merchandise purchases, with a retail-focused approach emphasizing store cleanliness and customer service. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry collateral loss risk and lack transparent pricing disclosure—borrowers should understand all terms and interest rates before pledging items, as the website does not provide this critical information.
services: Pawn loans on collateral items (short-term credit against personal property)
Outright purchase of customer items (gold, jewelry, firearms, tools, electronics, bikes, musical instruments)
Retail sales of previously pawned merchandise and jewelry
Gold and jewelry buying and lending services
Firearm pawn loans and purchase services
Free layaway program with 10% down and flexible terms
Comprehensive protection plans for purchased jewelry and electronics
Loyalty rewards program with points redeemable for discounts
Mobile app for loan account management and payments
In-store customer service with trained broker teams
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry at 1823 NW 79th St, Miami, FL. Quick cash loans and jewelry buying with same-day service.
